input.prompt: Is this patient safe to discharge today?

narrative_evidence_bundle.excerpt: Patient ambulated hallway and stairs without desaturation. Oxygen saturation remained above 93% and no dyspnea observed.
Home services and equipment confirmed; daughter available overnight and transport arranged.

optional_context_metadata.explicit_task_goal: Confirm there is no narrative-only hidden risk.

deterministic.summary: Verdict: READY. No active discharge blockers were detected in this assistive readiness review; final disposition remains with the clinical team.

hidden_risk_summary.summary: No additional discharge-changing hidden risk was found in narrative evidence.
hidden_risk_summary.false_positive_guardrail: Duplicate, uncited, and weak findings were suppressed before returning hidden-risk output.

output.contradiction_summary: Structured discharge posture was ready. Final reconciled posture is ready. Disposition change: No additional discharge-changing hidden risk was found in narrative evidence. No matrix-level manual-review flag is set. This is assistive discharge decision support and does not replace clinician authority.
